headline: Qualcomm’s AI Device Push Tests Shift Beyond Smartphones For Investors
summary: Qualcomm (NasdaqGS:QCOM) CEO says the company is developing next-generation AI devices in partnership with nearly all major AI players. The plan focuses on AI-native consumer hardware such as glasses, wearables and ambient devices that sit beyond traditional smartphones. This shift points to a broader role for Qualcomm chips across emerging AI agent and wearable use cases. For investors who know Qualcomm mainly for smartphone processors and connectivity, this push into AI wearables and...

headline: Aaron Levie Says AI Agents Will Make Work More Accessible While Giving Experts A 'Huge Edge'
summary: Aaron Levie says AI agents will democratize complex work but increase demand for experts and skilled professionals.

headline: Qualcomm CEO Says OpenAI, Meta Are Working On AI Wearables That Could Replace Smartphones
summary: Qualcomm CEO says AI wearables with OpenAI and Meta could replace smartphones, shifting control from apps to AI agents in a new device era.
